class.name: GDKSocialGroup
class.brief_description: A Social Manager group tracking a set of users.
class.description: Created via [code]GDK.social.create_social_group()[/code] or [code]GDK.social.create_social_group_from_xuids()[/code]. Use [code]GDK.social.get_group_users()[/code] to retrieve the [GDKSocialUser] list.

method.name: get_local_user
method.description: Returns the local user associated with this social group.

method.name: is_loaded
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the social group has finished loading its initial data.

method.name: get_group_type
method.description: Returns the type of this social group.

method.name: get_group_type_name
method.description: Returns the group type as a human-readable string.

method.name: get_presence_filter
method.description: Returns the presence filter used by this group, if it is a filter-based group.

method.name: get_relationship_filter
method.description: Returns the relationship filter used by this group, if it is a filter-based group.

method.name: get_tracked_xuids
method.description: Returns the XUIDs currently tracked by this social group.

members.member: The local user associated with this social group.
Whether the social group has finished loading its initial data.
The type of this social group.
The XUIDs currently tracked by this social group.

constants.constant: A group created from a presence and relationship filter.
A group created from an explicit list of XUIDs.
